subject: docs: fix documentation issues — update README, create USER_GUIDE, fix stale references
body:
- README.md: Add missing features (workspaces, semantic duplicate detection,
  AI label suggestions, bulk operations, import undo, connect mode, context menu),
  fix stale claim of Markdown import support (JSON-only), update tech stack with
  ML/embedding dependencies, remove references to nonexistent docs
  (markdown-import-format.md, ai-research-output-guide.md), update project
  structure with missing directories (duplicates/, workspaces/, workers/),
  add CODEBASE_DOCUMENTATION.md reference, update config example with all options
- docs/USER_GUIDE.md: New plain-language end-user guide covering all features
  (workspaces, graph interaction, search, timeline, import/export, duplicate
  detection, analysis, bulk editing, PWA installation, troubleshooting)
- docs/CODEBASE_DOCUMENTATION.md: Fix stale pitfalls — update #16 (now semantic
  matching, not title-only), #17 (clarify title-based arc resolution), #32 (bulk
  edit exists now via BulkEditPanel), update import flow to document Smart Matching
  step, fix component organization list
- CLAUDE.md: Add USER_GUIDE.md and CODEBASE_DOCUMENTATION.md to project structure
  and auto-updated documentation files table

Tags: docs, readme, user-guide, documentation-audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
